## Description

Provide a short description of the task and its goal.

---

## Acceptance Criteria

Define **3–7 criteria** describing the expected behavior or result.
If there are more than **7 criteria**, consider splitting the task into smaller ones.

Example:

- [ ] The user can ...
- [ ] The system displays ...
- [ ] An error message is shown when ...

---

## Additional Context (optional)

Add any additional information here, such as:
- links to designs or documentation
- screenshots
- references to related tasks
